summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Dark/Light mode toggle, Live Chat Widget, Booking Widget (3-step wizard), React Hook fix verification, accessibility, and SEO. All major features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: 3 decorative background images (nebula.jpg, blackhole.jpg, cosmos.jpg) detected without alt during Playwright scan, but code review shows they have alt='' which is correct for decorative images
design_issues.note: This is actually correct implementation - decorative images should have empty alt attributes

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/consultation/book - creates booking successfully
Backend: GET /api/services - returns 7 services with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/cases - returns case studies
Frontend: Dark/Light mode toggle works - theme switches correctly
Frontend: Theme toggle icon changes (Moon ↔ Sun) with smooth animation
Frontend: CSS variables change correctly with theme (background, text colors)
Frontend: Live chat widget appears at bottom-right with notification badge
Frontend: Chat widget opens successfully on button click
Frontend: Welcome message displays: 'Halo! 👋 Saya asisten virtual KTI...'
Frontend: All 4 quick reply buttons present (Info Layanan, Konsultasi, Harga, Portofolio)
Frontend: Quick reply buttons work - bot responds with relevant answers
Frontend: Chat input and send button work correctly
Frontend: Bot responds to user messages with smart keyword-based responses
Frontend: Chat window can be closed and reopened
Frontend: Booking modal opens from navbar 'Konsultasi' button
Frontend: 3-step wizard with progress indicator (1, 2, 3) displays correctly
Frontend: Step 1 - Contact info form (name, email, phone, company) works
Frontend: Step 2 - Service selection dropdown works
Frontend: Step 2 - Date picker works (min: today, max: 30 days)
Frontend: Step 2 - Time slot selection works (8 time slots available)
Frontend: Step 3 - Message textarea works
Frontend: Step 3 - Booking summary displays correctly
Frontend: Form validation works - Next button requires required fields
Frontend: Back button navigation works between steps
Frontend: Booking submission works - POST /api/consultation/book successful
Frontend: Success message 'Booking Berhasil!' displays after submission
Frontend: Success toast notification appears
Frontend: Booking modal closes after completion
Frontend: React Hook warnings - No warnings detected (useCallback fix in OutboundScanInterface.jsx working)
Frontend: SEO - Page title properly set
Frontend: SEO - Meta description properly configured
Frontend: SEO - Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image) present
Frontend: SEO - Twitter Card meta tag present
